# madebyjustas.dev

> Independent web developer building fast, AI-optimized websites for service businesses. No agency overhead — direct communication, clear scope. 53+ websites shipped. Sub-1s load times. GEO + SEO baked in from day one.

## About

- [Home](https://madebyjustas.dev/): Positioning, proof points, process overview, and recent work.
- [About](https://madebyjustas.dev/about/): Background, approach, and how projects are run.
- [Services](https://madebyjustas.dev/services/): New Build, Audit & Optimize, and Maintenance — with FAQ.
- [Work](https://madebyjustas.dev/work/): Portfolio and case studies with before/after performance context.
- [Contact](https://madebyjustas.dev/contact/): Start a project or ask a question.
- [Audits](https://madebyjustas.dev/audits/): Free public audit series for service business websites.

## Services

- **New Build** — Discovery, custom design system, hand-coded build tailored to the project, schema + GEO foundations, Cloudflare deploy. 4–6 weeks.
- **Audit & Optimize** — 5-dimension audit (speed, SEO, GEO, UX, trust), prioritized action list, speed and schema fixes. 2–3 weeks.
- **Maintenance** — Monthly performance + GEO citation report, content/build updates, priority response.

Pricing: quote after a short discovery call.

## Process

1. **Audit** — Speed, SEO, GEO, UX, trust.
2. **Build** — Clean, hand-coded code tailored to the project; deployed on Cloudflare Pages with global CDN.
3. **Rank** — Schema markup, FAQ structure, local SEO from day one.

## Case studies

- [Blumu](https://madebyjustas.dev/work/blumu/): Conversion-focused marketing site for a local-services marketplace app.
- [Tvorteka](https://madebyjustas.dev/work/tvorteka/): Multi-page manufacturer site with product catalogue, price calculator, and local SEO.
- [Renginių LAB](https://madebyjustas.dev/work/renginiu-lab/): Event venue site with occasion-based structure and deep FAQ for Google and AI search.
- [inSpotlight](https://madebyjustas.dev/work/events-agency/): Agency portfolio with cinematic video hero.
- [Decks&Stories](https://madebyjustas.dev/work/decks-and-stories/): Global music platform with custom audio player and scalable content architecture.
- [Work index](https://madebyjustas.dev/work/): Full portfolio.
